arts.ttl: Fagioli’s Fiorentina Move: Juventus’ Financial Windfall and Douglas Luiz Saga
arts.sum: In a last-minute transfer deadline day drama, Nicolò Fagioli has bid farewell to Juventus after a decade-long association with the club, joining Fiorentina in a deal that could potentially reach €19 million. The agreement, finalized just an hour before the transfer window closed, sees Fagioli move on an initial loan with an obligation to buy. arts.ttl: Nicolò Fagioli’s Juventus Departure: Choosing Fiorentina Over Marseille and Allegri’s Input
arts.sum: After 11 years in the black and white stripes of Juventus, Nicolò Fagioli made a surprising move to Fiorentina. The transfer, which came down to the wire in the final minutes of the transfer window, sees Fagioli join the Viola on an initial loan deal worth 2.5 million euros, with a conditional obligation to buy set at 13.5 million euros plus 2.5 million in bonuses, potentially totalling 18.5 million euros. The post Nicolò Fagioli’s Juventus Departure: Choosing Fiorentina Over Marseille and Allegri’s Input appeared first on FootItalia.com.
